title: 151 10021A SEALANT, White
features: PERMANENT & FAST DRYING: 151 Deocrators Flexible Filler, fill all cracks and gaps before decorating to improve the final finish. Easy to use and fast drying.
DIY CARTRIDGE: 151 Decorators Filler, a white flexible sealant, fits standard DIY cartridge caulking guns.
PAINT ANY COLOUR: 151 Decorators Filler, applies white, ready to paint over in any colour, after only one hour!
CLEAN TO USE, EASY TO APPLY: Always ensure that the surface is smooth, clean, dry and free of moisture, grease and dust prior to applying.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use Decorators Filler. Colour: White. Store at room temperature.
